name: Open Trivia DB
description: Free trivia questions API with 5,000+ verified questions across 24 categories and 3 difficulty levels.
longDescription: Open Trivia Database (OpenTDB) provides a completely free JSON API for trivia questions. All content is user-contributed and verified. The database contains over 5,000 trivia questions across 24 categories including General Knowledge, Science, History, Geography, and Entertainment. Questions are available in multiple types (multiple choice, true/false) and difficulty levels (easy, medium, hard). Supports session tokens to prevent duplicate questions.
affiliateText: Building a trivia game? Host it for free on GitHub Pages or Netlify.
